meta.description: Web developer from Argentina based in Barcelona, Spain. Frontend-focused engineer with 5+ years building React and Node.js web applications.

og.title: Leandro Fernandez | Web Developer CV
og.description: Frontend-focused Web Developer with 5+ years of experience building React + Node.js applications.

twitter.title: Leandro Fernandez | Web Developer CV
twitter.description: Web developer based in Barcelona with strong frontend and full-stack experience.

about.heading: About Me
about.paragraph1: Software developer from Argentina. Currently living in Barcelona, Spain.
about.paragraph2: I develop web apps since 2015. During this time, I had the opportunity to work with a broad range of teams, where I was able to use tools and frameworks and deploy them on different cloud platforms successfully.
about.paragraph3: I am currently focused on exploring the AI engineering field using agents workflows and exploring how they can improve my productivity and make me a better engineer, always making focus on keeping a balance between innovation and quality

motivations.item1: Coming up with ideas that could be transformed into helpful utilities.
motivations.item2: Elaborating solutions for challenging technical problems and documenting them the best way I can.
motivations.item3: Finding ways to improve the UX of the projects I work on.

education.heading: Education
education.intro: Currently focused on applying to courses and workshops to keep myself updated in terms of new technologies that can help me become a better engineer.

technician.prefix: Computer Technician at E.T. 35 D.E. 18 Ing. Eduardo Latzina,

education.languages: Languages: Spanish (native), English: B2 certificate, conversational level.

items.item1: Joined the AI champions program and contributed to AI tooling adoption in AXA partners development teams, integrating Github Copilot after receiving training from Microsoft
items.item2: Improved development experience of the team by introducing AI tools to the workflow
items.item3: Continued contributing to the AXA Partners web applications

items.item1: Contributed to the frontend of the Axa Partners group of applications, working on a set of React apps customizable for different partners through configuration and internationalization.
items.item2: Worked on the integration of PWA support for the apps.
items.item3: Gained experience in the Azure cloud platform working on configurations for deployment pipelines and different automatization scripts.

items.item1: Working remotely with the web team on an ecommerce platform that sells seasonal boxes of beauty, wellness, fashion, and fitness products.
items.item2: Improve integration of A/B testing using Optimizely.

items.item1: First experience working remotely with an international team.
items.item2: Replatform: Accomplished a project to refactor an old jquery web app into a new React dashboard.
items.item3: Improved performance and code reliability issues adding typescript to the project.
items.item4: Added jest unit tests to improve code coverage on both components and Store logic.
items.item5: Developed new features working alongside product and designers team.
items.item6: Dealt with complex challenges related to websockets and messaging events using sendbird SDK.
items.item7: Worked on timezone dependant features for a webapp used by people in different zones of the world.
items.item8: Lead the development of a new web platform for users of sibly.
items.item9: Experience using an AWS setup with s3 and cloudfront.

items.item1Suffix: ) Progressive web app built with React and connected to a backend using graphQL query language.
items.item2: Implemented performance improvements to a React app that has complex components connected to a very large state using the apollo graphQL client while also considering optimistic results and caching strategies.
items.item3: Developed a web push notifications feature for produck's webapp notifications system.
items.item4Prefix: Developed react and vuejs web apps integrated to webflow (
items.item4Suffix: ) for many of Bons clients. Using a custom stack with nodeJS + airtable + mongoDB in the backend served by a Vercel serverless BE.

items.item1: Received training during "Alto Vuelo" course imparted by leaders of backend, frontend and mobile teams.
items.item2: Development of REST APIs written in JAVA, SCALA and node.js.
items.item3: Development of user interfaces powered by angularjs and React.
